brief_notes: Systems neuroscience paper on visual factorization. Key numbers match extraction: 128 multi-unit sites in V4, 128 in IT, chance = 1/64 object class, 90% PCA threshold, N=10 binary features, 100 base scenes × 10 parameter levels, 80/20 train/test split × 100 splits, 200ms frame separation, 50-99% PCA range, pose variation [-90,90] deg, position horizontal [-30%,30%] / vertical [-60%,60%], size ×1/1.6 to ×1.6, camera crop 20-100%. 4 figures. Good writing with clear structure.
